notes:
Ember 1.2.6

• Fix: a couple of Settings toggles on the Performance tab (the quit-proof hotkey helper, and running a file in the sandbox) showed "'SettingsDialog' object has no attribute '_set_status'" instead of working. They now work. Added an automatic check so this class of Settings bug can't slip through again.

Includes the setup-tour Gmail step (1.2.5), Gmail organising (1.2.4), the self-update fix + AI safe-open guard (1.2.3), and earlier fixes.
